title: Silky Night Uruguayan Grassy Empanadas
description: Flaky Uruguayian empanadas infused with the herbal notes of herbes-de-provence and the richness of dashi-extract, perfect for a romantic dinner. A paleo-friendly twist on a classic Uruguayan dish.

ingredients.name: Lamb's Tongue Grass (Orach Aegyptiaca leafy greens mix)
ingredients.notes: or substitute with spinach or kale

instructions: Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut the dough into 12 equal squares.
Mix the ground beef, lamb's tongue grass, herbes-de-provence, dashi-extract, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
Place a tablespoon of the beef mixture onto one half of each dough square, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Brush the edges with coconut oil and fold the other half of the dough over the filling to form a triangle, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with ghee (or clarified butter) and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
